results.title: OpenAI - Wikipedia
results.snippet: OpenAI was founded in 2015 in Delaware as a nonprofit. A for-profit subsidiary of the nonprofit was created in 2019, and a 2025 restructuring converted the subsidiary into a PBC that is 26% owned by the nonprofit. Microsoft previously invested over $13 billion into OpenAI, [12] and provides Azure cloud computing resources. [13]
results.content: OpenAI was founded in 2015 in Delaware as a nonprofit. A for-profit subsidiary of the nonprofit was created in 2019, and a 2025 restructuring converted the subsidiary into a PBC that is 26% owned by the nonprofit. Microsoft previously invested over $13 billion into OpenAI, [12] and provides Azure cloud computing resources. [13]

results.title: OpenAI: When and Why It Was Founded: Origins, Mission, and Early Vision
results.snippet: OpenAI was officially founded on December 11, 2015, as a research organization dedicated to developing artificial general intelligence (AGI) that benefits all of humanity. The founders—Elon Musk, Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, Wojciech Zaremba, and John Schulman—launched the project with the belief that powerful AI systems should remain accessible and aligned with human values ...

results.title: Google I/O 2026: News and announcements - The Keyword
results.snippet: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we're making AI more helpful for everyone. We're releasing two new models, Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5. Gemini Omni can create anything from any input, starting with video, and is a leap forward in world understanding, multimodality and editing, while Gemini 3.5 Flash is the first in our latest family of models combining frontier intelligence with action ...

Balances capability and efficiency.

results.title: Google I/O 2026: Gemini 3.5 Flash, Spark & Agentic AI
results.snippet: 1. Gemini 3.5 Flash: The New Default Model Gemini 3.5 Flash is Google's biggest Flash-tier model launch ever — and it shipped generally available the same day it was announced. As of May 19, 2026, it is the default model in the Gemini app and AI Mode in Google Search worldwide. If you opened Gemini today, you are already running it.
